channel.title: Kaia on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Kaia on Archive 03

item.title: Beneficiary of Won Stablecoins? Kaia (KAIA) Outlook Analysis
item.description: Kaia (KAIA), the successor to the Kakao and LINE blockchain lineages, is pushing KRW stablecoins, LINE Mini-apps, RWAs, and Asian on-chain finance to the forefront in 2026. However, its price remains significantly below its peak. Is KAIA a hidden gem for the era of Korean stablecoins, or an unfinished infrastructure still needing to prove the link between real-world usage and token value?

item.title: Is Now the Time to Buy Kaia ($Kaia) Coin? An Analysis and Investment Outlook
item.description: Three distinct personas debate the investment value of Kaia ($Kaia) coin, born from the merger of Kakao’s Klaytn and Line’s Finschia. They sharply analyze its overwhelming potential as Asia’s largest Web3 ecosystem against the potential risks of integrating two giant projects and their past limitations, arguing whether now is the right time to invest.

item.title: The Dawn of the Digital Won: What a KRW Stablecoin Means for Investors
item.description: The launch of a Korean Won stablecoin: Will it be the next STO craze or a new investment frontier? Kurumi bets on the explosive growth of issuer stocks and mainnet tokens, while Mikael warns of priced-in hype and the limits of a domestic-only market. We analyze the opportunities and pitfalls of owning a piece of future financial infrastructure.
